_comment: Curated UN Treaty Collection (MTDSG) instruments, one harvest engine over all of them (rule:configured-by-data). Keyed by mtdsg_no; `chapter` completes the ViewDetailsIII.aspx query, `title` is the authoritative English name (the page headline is generic), `sv`/`abbr` drive the folkrÃĊtt listing, `group` is the Swedish subject heading it files under. The MTDSG holds status only -- these instruments' authentic text lives in per-treaty UNTS PDFs, out of this uniform scrape.
